title: George Airport: slightly more feet through terminal
bodyText:
LOCAL NEWS - George Airport’s passenger numbers saw a 5% growth for August, compared to the same month in 2023.

More than 65 300 two-way passengers travelled through George Airport last month.


> According to the air route development project, Cape Town Air Access, George Airport, year-to-date, recorded a 2% growth, with almost 520 000 two-way passengers recorded.


Cape Town domestic terminal

The domestic terminal at Cape Town International Airport recorded a 6% growth for the month of August, with over 572 000 two-way passengers processed.

Year-to-date, the domestic terminal achieved a 7% year-on-year growth when compared to 2023, with over 4,64 million passengers moving through the terminal.

Below is a summary of passenger performance at George Airport.


> Cape Town international terminal


The international terminal at Cape Town International Airport keeps setting records with 20 months of continuous growth being recorded to date.

The month of August registered a 7% year-on-year increase compared to the same period in 2023, with over 213 000 two-way international passengers travelling through the terminal.

For the first eight months of 2024, year-on-year growth of 11% was achieved, reaching over 1,97 million passengers moving through the international terminal.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
